findings.text: No source materials or artifacts were provided in this work order. The task 'Locate and ingest Napier accommodation arrears source records' cannot be executed without evidence to ingest.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's source repository for any records related to Napier accommodation arrears, including tenancy agreements, rent ledgers, correspondence, or notices. Use ListMatterSources and InspectRecord tools to locate and retrieve relevant documents. If found, ingest them as source materials for this task.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for and ingest Napier accommodation arrears records
